Hi, I'm Dr. Gina Sam.

You might recognize me from a recent article in the Washington Post where I was referred to as the medical mystery doctor, solving a woman's health problems that were a mystery to many other doctors in my field.

And today, I'm going to reveal a newly discovered molecular switch that's the root cause of achy joints, bad knees, and even a stiff neck and lower back pain.

And if you experience tingling, numbness, burning, or even cold sensations, then trust me, you want to pay attention.

You see, I'm part of a small group of doctors who specialize in functional medicine, which is the field of uncovering the root cause behind diseases.

For over 20 years, I've been focused on helping people turn around life-threatening conditions by finding the root cause on a cellular level.

After graduating with both an M.D. and a master's in public health from Tufts University School of Medicine, serving as the former director at Mount Sinai, becoming a member of the American College of Physicians, and being certified by the American Board of Internal Medicine, I opened my own practice in New York City in 2014.

And for the past nine years, I've developed a unique approach that's helped thousands of everyday folks erase their most pressing health issues.

As a matter of fact, my approach has become so popular that I regularly treat top athletes, celebrities, executives, and even former heads of government in my exclusive New York City practice.

And I'm happy to say, at the time of writing this, I've helped literally thousands of patients regain their health by not just masking their symptoms, but by finding the root cause of their illnesses.

So, if your fingers cramp up whenever you try to open a jar, or if your neck is too stiff to turn, or even if you feel a pinch in your shoulders whenever you put on a shirt, here's what you need to know.

The root cause of back, joint, and knee pain has nothing to do with age, weight, genetics, or even inflammation.

This is the exact reason most doctors, osteopaths, and chiropractors never fix the root cause of joint, neck, and back pain.

Most doctors think that knee pain, or pain in the tiny joints in your fingers, or the large vertebrae in your spine are caused by structural problems within the joint.

Or worse, like a chiropractor, you just need to crack it into place.

The problem is, both osteopaths and chiropractors fail to understand pain on a cellular level.

They focus more on body parts and movement, but never think about what's actually causing these vital structures to degrade in the first place.

When I realized that such a big part of my research was to understand cells and the different functions they perform in the body, I was able to look at this problem from a completely different perspective.

The first step to understanding the root cause of joint and back pain is to first realize that all joints, including the vertebrae in the spine, are all made of the same types of biological tissues.

In fact, your spine is nothing more than a series of 33 joints that house and protect your spinal cord and nerve fibers, which extend to every part of your body.

It's made up of bones, cartilage, which facilitates the movement of the bones, and then, within the joint, you have the blood vessels and nerves, which often run through the joint.

This entire structure is normally bathed in synovial fluid, which lubricates and nourishes the joints, and overall keeps things running smoothly.

The moment I realized all joints are made up from very similar tissues, from the delicate joints of your fingers to the massive vertebrae on your lower back, was the key to finding a done-at-home solution that actually works without addictive drugs, dangerous chiropractors, or painful surgeries.

That's why I'm so excited to share this with you today, so folks can start to move around the house and spend time with loved ones without knee, hip, or back pain, and start to live a normal, pain-free life again.

Yet, before I do, let me share what other so-called experts, including your family doctor, will never admit.

You see, there are three popular pain solutions that most people turn to.

Yet they never eliminate the pain for good.

If they did, you wouldn't be watching this.

Now, I don't mean to scare you, but the first failed pain solution actually cuts down lifespan.

Because according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, this pain solution literally kills 40 Americans per day.

I'm talking about prescription painkillers.

Now, if 40 Americans die a day from painkillers, can you imagine how many lives have already been lost?

Think about this.

Autopsies and reports from several media outlets like CNN and ABC News state Michael Jackson, Elvis Presley, and Prince all died from painkillers.

Can you guess why?

It's because of what the Mayo Clinic and Medical News today call the rebound effect, where painkillers give temporary relief just for the pain to come back, hurting even more.

So, if you took painkillers for neck, knee, joint, or shoulder pain, you'd wake up with more pain than the day before.

Or, if you popped a pill for your back, the pain would come back twice as bad.

And this rebound effect keeps compounding until the body can't take it anymore, leading to side effects like heart failure, cancer, and eventually, as you have seen above, death.

Luckily, I'm going to show you a natural, instant way to feel almost permanent relief throughout your body, with zero side effects.

And the best part? You won't have to pay an arm and a leg to try this at-home remedy.

Yet first, let's talk about the second failed pain solution, non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, otherwise known as NSAIDs.

NSAIDs relieve pain by reducing inflammation.

At least that's what Big Pharma tells you, so they can take your money and keep you dependent on every dose.

What they will never tell you is that NSAIDs also have unexpected side effects, like cancer, and increase your chances of heart problems by 50 percent.

And as researchers at Oxford University put it, they speed up the ongoing degeneration of bones and connective tissues, accelerating the progression of radiographic knee osteoarthritis.

Simply put, NSAIDs break down cartilage, stop the body from regenerating new bones, and prevent repair of wear and tear damage.

Even scarier, here's what knees may look like after taking NSAIDs.

And although they might provide temporary relief, over time, you're now waking up with your knees, ankles, and back hurting more than before.

Or you're now having to lay on the couch with an ice pack on your back, neck, or hip, because of how extreme the aches and pain get.

And do you know why?

It's because NSAIDs only focus on inflammation, and not the root cause of your chronic pain.

Luckily, in the next couple minutes, I'll share with you exactly where your aches and pains come from, and the 11-second at-home remedy you can use today to renew joints from the inside out, easing joint, knee, and back pain, giving a stronger back, healthier joints, and flexible, stable knees.

And the third way that people try to help their back pain, but actually makes it worse in many cases, is chiropractic.

Chiropractors are sometimes well-meaning and helpful physical therapists, and there are some great ones out there.

But there's also fly-by-night chiropractors, who are only in it for the money, and invent their own adjustments that do nothing to help the root cause.

You see, when a spine, or any joint for that matter, is cracked or popped, all that's happening is an air bubble in the synovial fluid moving from one side of the joint to the other.

They aren't actually changing alignment, because alignment is determined by the relative tightness of the muscles connected to the joint.

However, because of the shock to your system, your body releases a tiny bit of endorphins to mask any potential pain, which gives you a little rush.

So while you do experience a feeling of momentary euphoria, you're also doing nearly permanent damage to the delicate cartilage in that joint.

Remember, each time a chiropractor delivers this micro-injury to the spine, the pain triggers muscle guarding, the body's defense mechanism, where muscles tighten around the site of pain or injury, in order to protect our joints and keep them from moving.

Which is why your back often becomes stiff and painful again between visits.

The worst part is, there's literally hundreds of documented cases of chiropractic adjustments causing permanent neck injury, headaches, or even paralysis.

In fact, just recently, there was a huge story in the news about a 29-year-old woman in Savannah, Georgia, who had four arteries in her neck severed after a local chiropractor performed a neck adjustment on her.

This seemingly innocent chiropractic visit resulted in this young woman experiencing cardiac arrest, stroke, and traumatic brain injury, leaving her wheelchair-bound and paralyzed from the neck down.

You see, once you already experience pain, it means there's degraded weakened cartilage, putting you at a much higher risk of injury from a chiropractic adjustment.

As they say, once you're feeling pain, far away from a chiropractor, you should remain.

So let's break it down.

Here's how chronic pain works and where it all begins in the first place.

You see, when we get injured, for example, in ankle sprain, or even when we put too much stress on joints and start to feel pain, our nerve cells send an ouch signal to our immune system.

This triggers your immune system to send cells, called cytokines, to the site of injury.

Now, cytokines' role, when working normally, is to bring down pain and heal the injury.

This is the typical inflammation response.

Once your body is fully healed, your nerve cells send a repaired signal to your immune system.

This tells your immune system that cytokines have done their job, and signals them to retreat.

Sometimes, for whatever reason, the immune system never receives that repaired signal.

Kind of like when your phone loses reception and stops receiving messages.

This can sometimes happen after tissue-specific injuries, but can also be triggered by viral infections, like the flu, which explains why people often experience stiffness and achy joints for an extended period of time after a viral infection.

The immune system sends more cytokines to the site of the injury to break down the tissue and repair it, over and over again.

This is what's known as chronic inflammation.

It's simply an immune response that just never goes away.

However, each time the tissue is broken down and repaired in an attempt to heal, the spongy tissue inside the cartilage loses a small amount of synovial fluid, leaving the joint more dried out, and smaller, each time.

Now believe me, this condition is worse than it sounds, because the real problem is this constant attack on the cartilage, whether it's in the knees, the wrists, ankles, the tiny joints in the fingers, and even the vertebrae that run up and down the spine, eventually causes joints to dry out, depleted of synovial fluid, shrinking the cartilage, reducing the amount of space between the moving parts of the skeletal system.

And once this cartilage shrinks, it puts pressure on the nerves, resulting in pain.

Or other sensations, like numbness, tingling, or even sensations of hot or cold that never go away.

Remember, when the cartilage is healthy, synovial fluid is literally like a Teflon coating for your joints.

You feel loose, limber, you move with complete freedom and pain free.

In fact, you most likely don't even notice or think about your joints at all.

However, once inflammation dries out your synovial fluid, nerves get pinched, muscles tighten, and suddenly you've got lower back pain, or a stiff neck, or aching knees.

To restore your joints and spine to their youthful, healthy function, you have to first stop the cytokine storm, and then rehydrate the cartilage with synovial fluid.

Synovial fluid provides nutrition to the cartilage lining the spine and joints, lubricates them, and reduces friction.

And as you probably guessed, until you restore the synovial fluid, the joint will continue to shrink and cause pain.

So, now that we understand the root cause of joint, knee, and back pain, how can we use this knowledge to not just stop the pain, but prevent it from ever returning?

That's the question I began to ask myself.

Rather than just masking the symptoms, like every other solution, I wanted to find a simple, all-natural, at-home remedy to give people their lives back.

Now, unfortunately, an off-the-shelf formula like this did not exist, and I had to look at ingredients myself, based on my own unique research and clinical expertise.

So, I began my journey looking for rare, exotic ingredients all around the world to address the root cause of joint and vertebrae degeneration.

Specifically, what could increase synovial fluid to rehydrate and promote healing within the joint, increasing spacing, and giving nerves room to breathe again?

First, I discovered Boswellia, the 2,000-year-old natural painkiller.

Because the first step to healing the pain is to turn off the chronic inflammation, the first ingredient I chose for this formula is called Boswellia.

This ancient herb, used for over 2,000 years for its pain-healing properties, has become a recent superstar in medical journals and research papers.

Studies show Boswellia gets to the root cause of your pain by inhibiting the production of cytokines, halting the cytokine storm.

It is an anti-inflammatory superhero that allows you to feel relief rapidly.

Recent studies show Boswellia can also rejuvenate aging skin, relieve knee discomfort, and even help ward off chronic illness.

Now, the next research-backed ingredient is a little-known superstar, quercetin.

It's a new plant compound that strengthens cartilage and bones.

You see, once we've stopped the cytokine storm with Boswellia, we need to rejuvenate your damaged cartilage, joints, and bones.

That's where the miracle molecule quercetin comes to the rescue.

According to the Journal of Molecular Medicine in 2022, quercetin is shown to improve the structural integrity of your joints, keeping the cartilage strong and preventing it from shrinking.

Studies showed quercetin prevents the joints in your back and knees from shrinking and aging, then helps your body regrow strong, new cartilage, allowing you to feel less and less pain, and increases the strength in your knees, back, or any other part of your body that hurts.

The latest research, published in the Harvard Health Letter, also shows quercetin to have promise in reducing high blood pressure, lowering bad cholesterol, improving immune health, and even supporting weight loss.

Quercetin is truly a miracle molecule for your entire health and well-being.

After you've cooled off any chronic inflammation with Boswellia and begun revitalizing your cartilage with quercetin, the next step is to reverse and repair the scar tissue that has accumulated in your joints.

The fastest, most effective way to do that without painful surgery is a special enzyme found only in pineapples called bromelain.

Bromelain accelerates the recoveries of blood perfusion and oxygen partial pressure in wound tissue.

Many people have scar tissue blocking the healing in their joints.

Before you can fully restore blood flow, it's important to clear out the scar tissue first.

That's why we've included bromelain in our formula.

In a 2021 study from the United Kingdom of 77 patients who took bromelain, scientists found that the patients started experiencing a 59% decrease in pain symptoms.

That's 59% less knee and back pain.

Bromelain's healing powers don't just stop with scar tissue, muscle soreness, and joint pain relief.

You see, one of the keys to healing dry, damaged tissue is restoring healthy oxygenation and blood flow, which is where our next workhorse ingredient comes in, methyl sulfonylmethane, better known as MSM.

Known as nature's joint healer, MSM restores blood flow and oxygenation to worn-out cartilage.

MSM promotes healing and cartilage regeneration, which reduces joint inflammation and pain.

Without the potentially serious side effects associated with painkillers or anti-inflammatory drugs, MSM also removes toxic waste products by increasing blood flow and accelerating the healing process in order to regain strength and mobility.

Even more, MSM helps in the production of collagen and keratin, two vital components for your connective tissues, but are also great for preventing wrinkles, leading to youthful, vibrant skin.

The final phase to restoring your joints to their full, pain-free, youthful function is rehydrating and lubricating your cartilage and spine with fresh, healthy synovial fluid.

This is where the dynamic duo of glucosamine and chondroitin work their magic.

Glucosamine helps regrow and renew your cartilage, keeping it lubricated for smoother joint movement and better flexibility.

And when combined with all-natural chondroitin, the synergistic hydrating and lubricating effects are compounded.

It literally helps your body rebuild that Teflon coating for your joints, minimizing friction, restoring the body's natural range of motion, and promoting pain-free movement.

And as glucosamine and chondroitin lubricate every nook and cranny of your joints, you'll start to feel less stiffness in your arms, back, neck, and knees.

Glucosamine and chondroitin have also been extensively studied for their role in healing pain, stiffness, and swelling in joints.

For example, a 2016 study of glucosamine and chondroitin demonstrated the combo helped to reduce pain, stiffness, functional limitations, and joint swelling as effectively as common prescription anti-inflammatory drugs.

But without the harmful side effects Big Pharma tries to cover up.

And while each ingredient has its own superpower to renew, heal, and lubricate your joints and vertebrae, they work even better when combined in the right ratio.

In fact, studies show glucosamine and chondroitin combined reduce heart disease by 65%.

After hundreds of hours of study, research, and testing, searching the globe, sourcing the highest quality clinically proven herbs, plants, and ingredients, my team and I have developed what we believe to be the most powerful and effective pain-reversing formulation ever created.
